title: clematis longipes
intro: Clematis longipes, also known as the Chinese Virgin's Bower, is a perennial vine native to China that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clematis longipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Clematis longipes typically involve drying the roots and stems to make tea or decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
